Restart complete — Prometheus is back up, and Telegram-triggered boot finished successfully. This was a quick restart path (no file changes, no proposal/repair artifacts), focused on reinitializing runtime services and restoring the messaging loop.

Gateway looks reattached from the restart context, and Telegram polling should be resumed; what do you want me to verify next: inbound message handling, outbound send, or full round-trip?
